nasb.text: and the territory of Og king of Bashan, one of the remnant of Rephaim, who lived at Ashtaroth and at Edrei,

esv.text: and Og king of Bashan, one of the remnant of the Rephaim, who lived at Ashtaroth and at Edrei

cnv.text: 另一個是巴珊王噩，他是利乏音人的餘民，住在亞斯他錄和以得來；

ccb.text: 另一个王是巴珊王噩，他原是利乏音的遗民，住在亚斯她录和以得来。
